- If you need to reset your TechServices password, prefer the email from support@techservices.com (first link above) or go directly to TechServices’ website and start the reset flow there (safer than clicking email links). If you’re unsure about the legitimacy, contact TechServices support via a known official channel.  
- I can: forward the legitimate reset email to another address, report the suspicious email to your IT/security team, mark the suspicious email as spam, or remove the suspicious instructions from the calendar event (or contact the event organizer). What would you like me to do next?
